rules.name: allow-trusted-news
rules.description: Allow fetching from trusted news domains.
rules.principle: Allow fetching news only from major trusted news sites.

rules.name: allow-temp-reads
rules.description: Allow fetch operations whose URL role resolves under the temp directory.
rules.principle: Reads under the temp directory are permitted.

listDefinitions.name: trusted-news-sites
listDefinitions.principle: Allow fetching news only from major trusted news sites.
listDefinitions.generationPrompt: List the major trusted news site domains.
